title: Impaling Bedrock Parity
description: Replaces Java's Impaling with bedrock's superior system.
body:
Overhauls the trident's "Impaling"﻿ enchantment by making a parity change to how bedrock's (and also how the combat snapshots work) system works, simply by using the new custom enchantment system introduced in 24w18a.
The system﻿ works by instead of only doing damage per level to only aquatic mobs, it instead does damage to any mob or player in a body of water (Also in rain), which is a huge buff to how the enchantment works, as you can now do a ton of damage to a player in a very specific scenario.

If anybody wants to use this datapack on their own world, whether it be a server or singleplayer, go ahead. Bedrock tridents rule!!﻿
